regeneration.notes: Sage optional. Without Sage, adapter runs fixture mode (JSON-RPC up; live compute unavailable). No committed Sage evidence bundles yet; not dual-backend evidence for rational equality.

knownDefects: Live Sage compute is scaffold/best-effort (zero-numerator identities); CI defaults to fixture mode when sage is not installed.
No offline_fixtures_passing Sage bundles under evidence/; dual-backend rational evidence today is SymPy + Mathematica fixtures only.
